chunks.title: Reign of Azariah of Judah
chunks.reason: Covers the accession, reign, and death of King Azariah.

chunks.title: Reign of Zechariah of Israel
chunks.reason: Describes the brief reign and death of Zechariah fulfilling Jehu's oracle.

chunks.title: Reigns of Shallum and Menahem
chunks.reason: Details the succession from Shallum to Menahem and his tribute to Assyria.

chunks.title: Reigns of Pekahiah and Pekah
chunks.reason: Chronicles the short reign of Pekahiah and the longer reign of Pekah ending in his assassination.

chunks.title: Reign of Jotham of Judah
chunks.reason: Covers the accession, deeds, and death of King Jotham.
